summary: In the context of the [ERC-6860](./eip-6860.md) `web3://` standard, this ERC extends the [ERC-6944](./eip-6944.md) resolve mode: This standard specifies that if a `Content-Encoding` header is returned by the `request()` call, then the returned data is decoded if necessary according to the specified algorithm before being returned to the client.
title: Content encoding in ERC-5219 mode Web3 URL
